creator: cperciva@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Erwin,

Erwin Schliske wrote:
>  Fetching public key from update1.FreeBSD.org... fetch: http://update1.FreeBSD.org/7.0-RELEASE/sparc64/pub.ssl 
>  : Not Found

Right, that explains it.

>  The Directory 7.0-RELEASE/sparc64 doesn't exist on the update server.  
>  Which method is the official one to install updates on sparc64?

FreeBSD Update does not support sparc64 currently -- basically it comes down
to sparc64 hardware not being fast enough to do FreeBSD Update builds without
delaying security advisories, and cross-building of FreeBSD Update updates
not working yet.

Colin Percival
